description: Detects weak session/authentication patterns in PHP: md5/sha1 for hashing, weak random for tokens (uniqid, rand, mt_rand). JSON version flags all function_call_expression nodes (cannot filter by function name or argument content without #match? predicate support). Precision reduced per D-07.

flag.message: Function call detected -- verify this is not md5()/sha1() for password hashing or uniqid()/rand() for token generation; use password_hash(PASSWORD_BCRYPT) and random_bytes() instead
